task.name: Add pauses at key moments in demo.cast

comment.message: Subsumed into Task 6 at plan-17-v6 — read-pauses are built into the 3-beat screenplay's beat-boundary timing.

task.name: Show plan paused → modified → v2 created

comment.message:
PLAN-13 PIVOT ARC — salient bits extracted from docs/session/ transcripts (source material for the demo cast narrative).
TRANSCRIPT MAP (IST local time, UTC+5:30): - ac2b52af...jsonl: 2026-04-09 16:14→18:51 — drafts v1 + triggers v1→v2 - eb521172...jsonl: 2026-04-10 10:28→12:33 — the v2→v3 pivot discussion - 9680eb1a...jsonl: 2026-04-10 13:48→18:28 — post-v3 execution (not needed for the demo narrative but preserved)
Plan-13 git tags for cross-reference: - plan-13-v1: 2026-04-09 18:15 IST (commit 45506c8) - plan-13-v2: 2026-04-09 18:44 IST (commit 8836bc8) — adds tsconfig-leak task - plan-13-v3: 2026-04-10 11:38 IST (commit b9e12d1) — multi-module Maven restructure - plan-13-complete: 2026-04-10 14:15 IST
Other 04-09/04-10 transcripts in ~/.claude/projects/-opt-workspace-code-flow/ were evaluated and found irrelevant: 1047aa4a (unrelated morning work), 5f4381be (stub), 441887d2 (devostat rename session), 048fe45c (plan-16 GitHub release start). The three in docs/session/ are the complete pivot arc.
=== BEAT 1: v1 SALIENT BITS (ac2b52af, plan emerges) === L29 16:24 — 'How about implementing a local task file as an alternative to linear. Like .agents/plans, maybe .agents/tasks.' L68 16:29 — 'For now, forget structure. What is a good file format for this? What are the options? What are the requirements from this file format?' L76 16:56 — 'Can we ignore human readability for now? I want it to be textual, but I'd like to focus on machine writability, extensible format. For humans to read We can always write a viewer for this later right?' L81 17:03 — 'Reviewable diffs are also low priority. Compare between YAML and XML for this format.' → settles on XML L102 17:17 — 'I prefer typed languages. Would typescript be an alternative to Python?' → TypeScript + precompile L194 17:59 — 'I will precompile to JS to avoid the 12MB esbuild dependency and the runtime overhead and the problem with missing features that need type information.' L248 18:08 — 'The very first task I want is a change to this plugin that just installs TS and the required deps at Session Start to data directory.' L262 18:11 — 'Add a second task solely Verify the deps installation manually, with risk High. Only after that I'll proceed.' → plan-13-v1 committed 18:15 IST
=== BEAT 2: JUST BEFORE v1 → v2 (ac2b52af, same session) === L528 18:39 — 'Do mvn clean and then process-resources' (build output contains tsconfig.json, unexpected) L570 18:43 — 'Use code-flow workflow to Update plan to add a task to remove copy of tsconfig.json later. I don't want to package it by mistake and leak info.' L576 18:43 — 'This is a plan version update. So proceed accordingly.' → plan-13-v2 committed 18:44 IST — Task 10: fix tsconfig leak by moving package.json to src/main/node/
=== BEAT 3: v2 SALIENT BITS (eb521172 start, morning of 04-10) === Pressure building: TS code, package.json, Maven resource copies, test fixtures all piling up at repo root with unclear homes. L138 10:47 — 'Are you only touching the /opt/workspace/code-flow folder? I don't want this work to affect my actual ~/.claude folder.' L213 11:14 — 'plan-13-tasks.xml should not go into .agents/plans. We're still developing this feature. Move it to some place where test input for a node project is present.'
=== BEAT 4: JUST BEFORE v2 → v3 (eb521172, ~90 min into session) === L219 11:16 — 'Examine the status of current active plan, I think we need to re-arrange this project as a Java mvn project that also has a Node/Typescript component to it. What do you think?' L228 11:21 — User pastes external AI suggestion: 'Setting up a polyglot project where Maven acts as the primary orchestrator for a Node/TypeScript codebase is a common pattern, especially for plugins... The secret sauce is the frontend-maven-plugin...' L232 11:27 — 'Actually, how about multi-module Maven project instead? Option 2: The Multi-Module Maven Project (Recommended)...' L237 11:28 — 'I want to explore multi-module approach. Show me what multi-module folder structure would look like for current project and requirements.' L241 11:31 — 'I like this. Yes, plan this out. Make this as an update version of current active plan.' L263 11:33 — 'Use code-flow workflow. You have to create a new version of the plan' L268 11:35 — 'Looks good. You can go ahead and edit it. But don't forget to tag it as v2, update Linear etc. do not update the local plan-13-tasks.xml, that was wrongly checked in.' L272 11:36 — 'Yes. Delete plan-13-tasks.xml. Yes make plan v3. The linear part looks good.' → plan-13-v3 committed 11:38 IST — three new Maven modules (plugin-node / plugin-resources / plugin-dist)
=== WHY THIS IS GOOD DEMO MATERIAL === Clean three-beat shape: 1. v1→v2 (small in-session nudge): user catches concrete defect (tsconfig.json leaking), asks for plan VERSION BUMP rather than silent fix. Demonstrates 'plan is the contract — never autonomously modify it.' 2. Overnight gap: session ends 04-09 ~19:00 IST, resumes 04-10 ~10:30 IST. Clean transition break for the demo. 3. v2→v3 (major pivot): user consults another AI, comes back with structural idea, explores, promotes to v3, invokes code-flow workflow explicitly to handle version bump correctly. Demonstrates 'plan as contract' under a BIG change, not just a patch. Both moments are authentic. Neither invented for the camera.
=== NEXT DECISION (when resuming) === Pick one of: (a) small v1→v2 nudge — tighter, fits in a short GIF cleanly (b) big v2→v3 pivot — more dramatic, requires overnight-gap transition visual (c) both, using the 3-beat shape above — richest narrative, longest cast

SCREENPLAY DRAFTED (2026-04-14) — see /home/pramod/.claude/plans/zany-meandering-cook.md for full timing table.
Direction: discard the todo-app Next.js cast entirely. Rebuild demo.cast around the real plan-13 v1→v2→v3 pivot arc preserved in docs/session/. Target 30-40s, <2MB GIF.
3-beat structure: - Beat 1 (4s→16s): in-session v1→v2 nudge. User runs `mvn clean process-resources`, spots tsconfig.json in target/classes/, pauses, asks for plan version update to add a task moving package.json to src/main/node/. Plan edited, committed, lefthook auto-tags plan-13-v2. Execution resumes. - Transition slide A: "End of session · 2026-04-09 18:50 IST" → "Next morning · 2026-04-10 10:28 IST" - Beat 2 (17.5s→32s): next-morning v2→v3 pivot. User resumes, proposes multi-module Maven restructure, pastes 3-line excerpt from Google Gemini (prefix: dim "(pasted from Google Gemini)"), asks for v3. Plan edited, committed, lefthook tags plan-13-v3. Old tasks 10-12 closed at v2, new tasks 10-13 created from v3. - Beat 3 (32s→35s): git log --oneline --tags=plan-13-* — shows three immutable tags as the payoff closing frame.
Four decisions locked (2026-04-14): 1. Real IST timestamps on screen (2026-04-09 18:39, 2026-04-10 10:28, 2026-04-10 11:38) — they cross-ref the preserved transcripts. 2. Pasted block labelled "(pasted from Google Gemini)", 3-line excerpt only, ~1s screen time. 3. Stay true to actual devostat UX — no aspirational affordances. Every on-screen line must be something the current skill produces or a human would plausibly type. Dropped the "Major deviation — escalating to plan revision" yellow line. 4. Keep the $EDITOR .agents/plans/plan-13.md → dim summary → save idiom at both plan-edit beats.
Subsumes Tasks 5 (pauses at key moments — built into every beat boundary) and 7 (non-continuous session transition — the two transition slides). After executing, Tasks 5/6/7 all move to agent-coded together.
Next session: open the plan file above and author docs/demo.cast from the timing table. Re-render via the existing agg command.

Rewritten at plan-17-v6 — retargeted from 'extend existing cast' to 'rewrite cast around real plan-13 v1→v2→v3 pivot arc.' See plan-17.md Task 6 section for the full screenplay spec, timing table, and locked decisions. Tasks 5 and 7 subsumed into this task.
Subsumed into Task 6 at plan-17-v6 — the two transition slides (End of session / Next morning) are structural to the 3-beat screenplay.

task.name: Link plan + tasks file from README
PII / secret scan of plan-13 pivot transcripts

comment.message: Scan complete. 0 secret/token hits across all three transcripts. All credential/email/home-path hits are false positives (template placeholders, idioms, user's own git-config email already public in every commit, /home/pramod already present in plan-03.md). No redactions required — files safe to copy as-is.

task.name: Switch demo.cast to asciinema v3 with relative timestamps

update.message: Plan complete. All tasks agent-coded. Merged to main at 9a6614f. Tagged plan-17-complete.
